_schema.description: SHA-256 of every file in src/dazzle/page/runtime/static/vendor/. CI gate test_vendor_hashes.py recomputes these and fails on drift; scripts/update_vendors.py regenerates entries it touches (htmx core + 4 extensions, idiomorph, lucide) as part of its auto-update PR. Other entries (lucide, pdfjs, etc.) are vendored manually — to update one of those, run scripts/update_vendor_hashes.py after replacing the file.
